<!--
PR title must be a Conventional Commit, e.g. "feat: add emoji reactions".
It becomes the squash-merge commit message on main. See CONTRIBUTING.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new capability
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` / `refactor` / `docs` / `test` — no user-facing behavior change

## How I tested this

<!-- The command you ran or the flow you clicked through. "lint + typecheck + build green" is a fine baseline. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] CI passes locally (lint + typecheck + build/test)
- [ ] Linked the issue this closes (`Closes #123`)
